subcodes.first_line: O blessed leaf! The longing to circumambulate the gathering-place of the Supreme Concourse hath kindled a blazing fire within thy heart and soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مبارکه شوق طواف مطاف ملا اعلی آتش پرشعله در دل و جانت افروخته از فضل
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @love and unity, @consolation and comfort, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @recompense; reward for belief; right action
